releases.author: redzumi
releases.description:
* Enhance ObsidianAgentTools with new folder management and character limit checks for note creation. Implement ensureParentFolder method to verify folder structure before creating notes. Update appendNewNote and proposeNewNote methods to enforce chunk size limits and improve error messaging. Refactor AIChatClient to handle invalid JSON responses more effectively and summarize actions for history tracking. (14ca9a5)
* Enhance ObsidianAgentTools with new note management features: implement beginNewNote, appendNewNote, and finishNewNote methods for handling long notes. Update AIChatClient to reflect new note creation process and improve user guidance on note management. Adjust edit tools to include new methods for better integration. (508b5fa)
* Implement proposeNewNote functionality in ObsidianAgentTools, allowing users to prepare new notes for review. Update PendingEdit type to include 'create' kind. Enhance AIChatClient to support new note creation and update UI to reflect changes in edit notifications. Improve error handling for note creation scenarios. (bc6328c)
* Refactor chat functionality to introduce a unified agent intent system. Update README to reflect changes in chat modes, rename CSS classes for clarity, and modify settings to allow selection of default chat intent (Ask or Edit). Enhance AI chat client and main plugin logic to support new intent-based interactions. (ad963b2)
* Rename plugin from "Vault Chat Assistant" to "Vault AI Assistant" across all relevant files, including configuration, manifest, README, and source code. Update associated commands and notifications for consistency. Replace "builtin-modules" with "module" in esbuild configuration. (05724e7)
